metadata.title: Finito Pro | Swiss SMB Software - Project Management, Invoicing & CRM
metadata.description: Finito Pro is the all-in-one software for Swiss SMBs. Manage projects, create QR invoices, maintain customer relationships and coordinate your team. 100% Swiss data. Try 30 days free.
metadata.keywords: SMB software Switzerland, project management, QR invoices, CRM, trade business software, time tracking, quotes, Swiss software

hero.title: Swiss SMB Software for Trade Businesses
hero.subtitle: Manage projects, create QR invoices, coordinate your team – all in one app. 100% Swiss data.
hero.trust: No credit card required · 30 days free · Swiss servers

workflow.title: How Finito Works
workflow.subtitle: From quote to invoice – in 3 simple steps
workflow.step1Desc: Create professional quotes in minutes. Saved service catalogs with prices make it lightning fast.
workflow.step2Desc: Your team works with the smartphone app. Document with photos, track time, manage materials – all digital.
workflow.step3Desc: One click turns the project into a QR invoice. Automatic VAT calculation and payment reminders included.

features.title: The All-in-One SMB Software
features.subtitle: All the tools your business needs – in one platform

rechnungen.title: QR Invoices
rechnungen.description: Create professional Swiss QR invoices in seconds. Automatic VAT calculation, payment reminders and seamless export to your accounting software.

bullets.1: Swiss QR invoices compliant with ISO 20022 standard
bullets.3: Payment reminders via email or mail
bullets.4: Export as PDF or directly to accounting software
bullets.5: Manage partial payments and installment plans
bullets.6: Automatic payment matching with bank accounts

crm.title: Customer Management
crm.description: All customer data in one place. Contact history, recurring orders and individual notes make collaboration efficient.

bullets.1: Central contact management with search function
bullets.2: Complete customer history with all projects and invoices
bullets.4: Individual notes and documents per customer
bullets.5: Customer categories and tags for segmentation

projektmanagement.title: Project Management
projektmanagement.description: Manage all projects on the go. Assign tasks, create photo documentation and coordinate your team at any time.

bullets.1: Mobile task management with status tracking
bullets.2: Photo documentation directly in the project
bullets.5: Drag-and-drop task planning in the calendar

zeiterfassung.title: Time Tracking
zeiterfassung.description: Project-based time tracking with one click. Monthly reports, overtime tracking and direct export for payroll.

bullets.1: One-click time tracking per project and task
bullets.5: GPS-based tracking on the job site
bullets.6: Track breaks and travel time separately

offerten.title: Quotes
offerten.description: Create digital quotes fast with saved service catalogs. Convert to an order with the push of a button.

bullets.1: Saved service catalogs for quick creation
bullets.2: Professional quotes in your own company design
bullets.3: One-click conversion from quote to order

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: All key metrics at a glance. Financial KPIs, active projects, employee utilization and annual reports.

bullets.1: Financial KPIs: revenue, open invoices, cash flow
bullets.4: Annual and monthly reports as PDF

ferienmanagement.title: Vacation Management
ferienmanagement.description: Mobile vacation requests, remaining days overview and approval workflow. With team calendar, no more bottlenecks.

bullets.1: Mobile vacation requests from your smartphone
bullets.6: Public holidays and bridge days pre-configured

fotoDokumentation.title: Photo Documentation
fotoDokumentation.description: Before/after photos with automatic project assignment. Perfect quality proofs for clients and insurance companies.

bullets.1: Before/after photos directly in the project
bullets.2: Automatic assignment to the correct project
bullets.3: Quality proofs for clients and insurance companies
bullets.4: Timestamp and GPS data per photo
bullets.6: Upload photos directly from your smartphone

lagerverwaltung.title: Inventory Management
lagerverwaltung.description: Material and tool management with automatic deduction per project. Keep track of your inventory at all times.

bullets.1: Material and tool management in one place
bullets.4: Minimum stock warnings for low supplies

buchhaltung.title: Accounting
buchhaltung.description: Manage income and expenses, cost management and export for your accountant. All data securely stored on Swiss servers.

bullets.2: Cost management per project and customer
bullets.4: All data securely stored on Swiss servers
bullets.6: VAT statement prepared for the FTA

mitarbeiterApp.title: Employee App
mitarbeiterApp.description: View tasks, track time, upload photos and communicate with your team – all from your smartphone.

bullets.1: Tasks and daily schedule on your smartphone
bullets.2: Start time tracking with one click
bullets.3: Upload photos and assign to project
bullets.5: Offline mode for job sites without reception

kundenportal.title: Customer Portal
kundenportal.description: Share project progress with your clients. Transparent communication and progress photos build trust.

bullets.5: View invoices and documents in the portal
bullets.6: No app installation required for clients

serviceAbos.title: Service Subscriptions
serviceAbos.description: Manage recurring orders with automatic project creation. Perfect for maintenance contracts and service subscriptions.

bullets.6: Customer history with all service calls

newModules.title: New Modules
newModules.subtitle: Time Tracking & Vacation Management – now available

testimonial1.quote: Since we started using Finito, we save several hours every week on invoicing. The QR invoices are a game changer.
testimonial1.author: Marco Bianchi

testimonial2.quote: Finally, software that is truly made for tradespeople. My team uses the app daily on the job site.
testimonial2.author: Sandra Mueller

testimonial3.quote: The quotes feature has completely transformed our sales process. From offer to order in minutes instead of days.
testimonial3.author: Thomas Widmer

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: From CHF 1 per day – no hidden costs
pricing.starterDesc: Ideal for sole proprietors and small teams taking their first steps in digitalization.
pricing.kmuDesc: Our most popular plan for medium-sized businesses with advanced features.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: For businesses with complex requirements and individual needs.
pricing.guaranteeDesc: Try Finito risk-free. If you are not satisfied, you get your money back.

faq.title: Questions About Our Pricing
faq.q1: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There is no minimum contract period or hidden fees.
faq.q2: What happens after the trial period?
faq.a2: After 30 days, simply choose the right plan for you. Your data is preserved and you can continue working seamlessly.
faq.a3: Of course. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Billing is adjusted pro-rata.
faq.q4: Are there discounts for annual payment?
faq.a4: Yes, with annual payment you save 20% compared to monthly billing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Finito
faq.a1: Finito is specifically developed for Swiss SMBs in the trade and service sector. Painters, electricians, plumbers, carpenters, landscapers and many other industries use Finito daily.
faq.a2: All data is stored exclusively on Swiss servers. We work with certified Swiss data centers and comply with all requirements of the Swiss Data Protection Act (DSG).
faq.q3: Can I try Finito for free?
faq.a3: Yes, you can try Finito free for 30 days with no obligation. No credit card required. After the trial period, simply choose the right plan for you.
faq.a4: Yes, the employee app has an offline mode. Your employees can track time, take photos and edit tasks even on job sites without internet connection. Data is automatically synced once a connection is restored.
faq.q5: Does Finito create Swiss QR invoices?
faq.a5: Yes, Finito creates QR invoices according to the Swiss ISO 20022 standard. VAT is calculated automatically and invoices can be sent as PDF or exported directly to your accounting software.
faq.a6: Most businesses are up and running within 15 minutes. Customer data can be imported via CSV. If needed, we also offer personal onboarding sessions.
faq.q7: Is there an app for employees?
faq.a7: Yes, Finito offers a native app for iOS and Android. Your employees can view tasks, track time, upload photos and communicate with the office – all from their smartphone.
faq.q8: Can I switch from another software?
faq.a8: Yes, we support importing customer data, projects and items from common formats. Our support team is happy to assist you with the migration.
faq.a9: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), TWINT, bank transfer and LSV/direct debit. Invoices can also be paid via QR invoice.
faq.a10: Yes, full API access is included in the Enterprise plan. This allows you to integrate Finito into your existing systems and automate workflows.

contact.demoDesc: Would you like to see Finito in action? Schedule a free 30-minute demo with our team.

team.title: The Finito Story
team.subtitle: Our Software for Service Providers
team.story: We believe that small and medium-sized businesses are the foundation of our society. That is why we built Finito – software that helps trade businesses work more efficiently.
team.innovationDesc: We continuously develop new features based on our customers' feedback.
team.simplicityDesc: Making complex processes simple – that is our standard for every feature.
team.customerFocusDesc: We listen, understand needs, and deliver. Fast and pragmatic.
team.swissQualityDesc: Developed in Switzerland, hosted in Switzerland, with Swiss data protection standards.
team.vision: Our software was built for doers – to optimize project and work processes. When businesses manage orders more efficiently, more time remains for what truly matters.
team.mission: With Finito, trade businesses can process orders much faster and more professionally. Resources are better utilized, time and costs are saved, and customer relationships are strengthened.
team.founderDesc: Founded by entrepreneurs who know the challenges of daily SMB operations firsthand.

featurePages.integrationDesc: This feature works seamlessly with all other Finito modules.
featurePages.ctaSubtitle: 30 days free. No credit card required.

problems.rechnungen: Many SMBs still create invoices manually with Word or Excel. This is time-consuming, error-prone and often does not comply with the new QR standard.
problems.crm: Customer data is scattered across emails, notes and Excel files. Important information gets lost and communication suffers.
problems.projektmanagement: Without digital project management, you quickly lose track. Tasks are forgotten, deadlines are missed and the team does not work in a coordinated manner.
problems.zeiterfassung: Handwritten time sheets are inaccurate and tedious to evaluate. Payroll becomes a nightmare.
problems.offerten: Creating quotes manually takes a long time. Without saved price lists, every calculation has to be done from scratch.
problems.dashboard: Without a central overview, you lack the big picture. Key metrics are spread across different systems.
problems.ferienmanagement: Vacation requests via email or paper are chaotic. Without a team calendar, bottlenecks and double bookings occur.
problems.fotoDokumentation: Photos on various smartphones with no clear assignment to projects. Quality proofs get lost.
problems.lagerverwaltung: Inventory is tracked manually. Stock shortages are noticed too late and delay projects.
problems.buchhaltung: Receipts pile up, bookkeeping is postponed and the accountant receives incomplete documents.
problems.mitarbeiterApp: Employees on the job site have no access to current project information and have to clarify everything by phone.
problems.kundenportal: Clients constantly call to find out the project status. This costs time and creates uncertainty.
problems.serviceAbos: Recurring orders are tracked manually. Maintenance deadlines are missed and clients are dissatisfied.

solutions.rechnungen: With Finito, you create professional QR invoices in seconds. VAT is calculated automatically, payment reminders are sent and the export to your accounting is seamless.
solutions.crm: Finito brings all customer data together in one place. Contact history, projects, invoices and notes are instantly accessible. Recurring orders are scheduled automatically.
solutions.projektmanagement: With mobile project management, you stay on top of things. Assign tasks, track progress and coordinate your team in real-time – even on the go.
solutions.zeiterfassung: One click is all it takes: time tracking per project and task. Automatic monthly reports, overtime tracking and direct export for payroll.
solutions.offerten: Saved service catalogs make quote creation lightning fast. One click converts the quote into an order. Including digital customer signature.
solutions.dashboard: All key metrics at a glance: revenue, open invoices, project progress and employee utilization. With custom widgets and filters.
solutions.ferienmanagement: Mobile vacation requests, automatic remaining days calculation and team calendar. The approval workflow runs digitally and transparently.
solutions.fotoDokumentation: Take and assign photos directly in the project. With timestamp and GPS data. Perfect quality proofs for clients and insurance companies.
solutions.lagerverwaltung: Manage materials and tools digitally. Automatic deduction per project, minimum stock warnings and supplier linking for quick reordering.
solutions.buchhaltung: Manage income and expenses clearly. Automatically categorize receipts and have everything ready to export for your accountant.
solutions.mitarbeiterApp: The native app for iOS and Android puts all information in your team's hands. Also available offline, with automatic synchronization.
solutions.kundenportal: Give your clients access to project progress. Photos, documents and invoices – all transparent and without app installation.
solutions.serviceAbos: Recurring orders are automatically scheduled and billed. Digitally map maintenance contracts and never miss an appointment again.
